query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.sector,
  p.location,
  p.stage,
  p.priority,
  p.capexGrade,
  p.owner,
  p.contractors,
  p.matchedBusinessLines,
  p.projectKey,
  p.createdAt,
  p.sourceUrl
FROM projects p
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
